Variables.Name: SourceBusChannels
Variables.Description: How many channels to use for the source bus.

Variables.Name: SourceBusDuration
Variables.Description: The duration (in seconds) to use for the source bus. A duration of 0.0 indicates to play the source bus indefinitely.

Variables.Name: bAutoDeactivateWhenSilent
Variables.Description: Stop the source bus when the volume goes to zero.
